content: Tools are self-contained in src/tools/<ToolName>/ directories. Each directory contains: the main tool class (e.g., BashTool.ts), input schema, permissions logic, and UI components (React/Ink). Tool names use PascalCase (e.g., FileEditTool, AgentTool). All tools extend the base Tool class from src/Tool.ts.

name: system-ripgrep-default
description: Prefer system ripgrep by default when available unless USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP explicitly forces the bundled binary; this avoids missing vendor/ripgrep paths in Docker builds.

name: tool-retry-circuit-breaker
description: Wrap MCP tool calls with ToolRetryWrapper: 2x retries with exponential backoff (1s, 3s), circuit breaker trips after 3 consecutive failures (resets after 60s). Use TOOL_FALLBACKS chain for graceful degradation (meta_ai_chat→WebSearch, nitter→WebSearch).
